summary: Tested new Real Sector panel with LSM (Large-scale Manufacturing) Quantum Index. UI implementation is correct - panel renders with LIVE badge, LSM card is clickable, modal opens with time range buttons (YTD, 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, 10Y, 20Y, ALL), chart container present. However, LSM data shows '--' due to SBP EasyData API rate limiting (hourly limit exhausted). All existing panels (Economic, Inflation, Business Environment, Weather) render correctly - no regression detected.

critical.issue: Returns null data due to SBP EasyData API rate limit exhaustion. The code doesn't handle rate limit error responses (status 200 but with error JSON body)
critical.root_cause: SBP API returns status 200 with JSON error message {'error': 'Your hourly API call hit limit is exhausted.'}, but code only checks status_code != 200, so it processes empty rows

minor.issue: Missing error handling for rate limit responses - API returns 200 with error JSON instead of error status code

passed_tests: Real Sector panel renders with LIVE badge
LSM Quantum Index card present with correct label
LSM card shows description 'Quantum Index of Large-scale Manufacturing (Increase is good)'
LSM card is clickable - opens modal
LSM modal title shows 'QUANTUM INDEX OF LARGE-SCALE MANUFACTURING'
LSM modal has time range buttons: YTD, 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, 10Y, 20Y, ALL
LSM modal shows source: STATE BANK OF PAKISTAN / PBS
LSM modal shows Last Updated date
Regression: Business Environment panel renders correctly
Regression: No error messages on page
action_items: Add error handling in fetch_lsm_historical_data() to detect SBP API rate limit errors in response body (status 200 with error JSON)
Consider implementing caching with longer TTL to reduce API calls
When rate limited, could return cached data or mock data as fallback
critical_code_review_comments: fetch_lsm_historical_data() line 1549-1550: Only checks response.status_code != 200, but SBP API returns 200 with error JSON body for rate limits - need to check for 'error' key in response
Similar issue likely exists in other SBP API fetch functions

success_rate.backend: 35% (6/17 tests passed - most failures due to API rate limiting returning null data)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI renders correctly, modal works, all regressions pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: LSM Real Sector panel UI is fully implemented and working. The main issue is SBP EasyData API rate limiting causing null data to be returned. The API returns status 200 with error JSON {'error': 'Your hourly API call hit limit is exhausted.'} instead of a proper error status code. Backend needs error handling fix to detect this. When rate limit resets (hourly), LSM data should populate correctly. Test again after rate limit reset to verify actual data flow.

api_rate_limit_issue.description: SBP EasyData API hourly rate limit exhausted during testing

sbp_api_response.error: Your hourly API call hit limit is exhausted.

api_rate_limit_issue.workaround: Wait for hourly limit reset or implement better caching

lsm_card.label: LSM QUANTUM INDEX
lsm_card.description: Quantum Index of Large-scale Manufacturing (Increase is good)

color_semantics_note: LSM card change indicator uses 'up' class for positive (green) and 'down' class for negative (red) - verified in code. Cannot verify live due to null data.
